name: Eden

notes: all combat numbers are simulator output on unverified constants
checkpoint levels are provisional (no level timeline in the match feed)
evidence deltas carry finished-inventory survivorship bias
this build stacks over +100% attack speed and the sim has NO measured attack-speed cap (calibration checklist 7) — sustained-DPS numbers are optimistic until the cap is measured

coachLine: Sim-optimal for sustained DPS: first spike lands around minute 12 (Sky Splitter), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +21.4% on this kit’s main output at minute 15.

all.name: Marrow
all.note: Marrow (Major): missing-health-dependent omnivamp; no sustain-uptime model yet

all.name: Nihil
all.note: Nihil (Major): accrual rate depends on combat uptime (how long Doom persists per fight), which the closed-form sim cannot observe

all.name: Aion
all.note: Aion (Major): economy effect; valuable but outside combat objectives (revisit with gold curves)

all.name: Exarch
all.note: Exarch (Major): buffs the HEAL TARGET (usually an ally) — team-side value outside the single-hero sim; self-heal uptime depends on heal cadence vs the 4s window

augments.name: Kinetic Waltz
augments.note: applies to the Axiom Strike stance of the shared slot; movement speed not scored

augments.name: Limit Break: Echo
augments.note: Echo: full basic-cooldown refresh on ult cast; rotation restructure, no tractable closed form yet

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for lifesteal sustain, online around minute 25 — about 136 HP drained back over a 10s fight in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +58% more lifesteal sustain: try Sky Splitter over Vanquisher (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for extended fights vs bruisers, online around minute 24 — about 1,300 damage over a 20s fight in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +15% more extended fights vs bruisers: try Sky Splitter over Vanquisher (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 25 — about 146 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees 2.0× the sustained auto DPS: try Sky Splitter over Vanquisher (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: Your kill threat peaks early-to-mid: cash it in before their later items level the exchange.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Sky Splitter: their 3s all-in loses 37% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Sky Splitter: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Sky Splitter: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Sky Splitter: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 39% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your window is early: force trades before their core completes, and do not coin-flip fights past the crossover.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Sky Splitter: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 38% of your damage.

flags: crests and consumables not yet in the build model; augments with tractable mechanics are simulated, the rest are listed unmodeled
